summary.what_built: This module creates an API endpoint that returns a hardcoded portfolio snapshot in JSON format.
summary.problem: It provides a way to retrieve current portfolio information without needing to access a database.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to the lack of dynamic data retrieval and error handling, which could lead to issues in production.
summary.validation: The code has been checked for syntax errors and basic functionality.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new API endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: There is uncertainty regarding how this static data will perform under real-world conditions and whether it meets user needs.
